mapper.insert: INSERT INTO collection_order_flow_log ( transaction_no, step_code, step_name, step_seq, success, payload, trace_id, event_time, create_time ) VALUES ( #{transactionNo}, #{stepCode}, #{stepName}, #{stepSeq}, #{success}, CAST(#{payload,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS jsonb), #{traceId}, #{eventTime}, #{createTime} )

INSERT INTO collection_order_flow_log ( transaction_no, step_code, step_name, step_seq, success, payload, trace_id, event_time, create_time ) VALUES
( #{item.transactionNo}, #{item.stepCode}, #{item.stepName}, #{item.stepSeq}, #{item.success}, CAST(#{item.payload,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS jsonb), #{item.traceId}, #{item.eventTime}, #{item.createTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, transaction_no, step_code, step_name, step_seq, success, payload::text AS payload, trace_id, event_time, create_time FROM collection_order_flow_log WHERE transaction_no = #{transactionNo} AND create_time >= #{startTime} AND create_time < #{endTime} ORDER BY step_seq ASC, event_time ASC, create_time ASC, id ASC
